reviews.comment:
Es un hito y un clásico, frontera entre Santa fé y Córdoba de la vieja ruta 9 .....la de una mano sola......

(Translated by Google)
It's a landmark and a classic, the border between Santa Fe and Córdoba on the old Route 9... the one-way road...

reviews.comment:
Muy buena parada el ACA de Tortugas autopista Rosario Córdoba, tiene un area de descanso con buena sombra, mesas y asadores.

(Translated by Google)
The ACA stop in Tortugas on the Rosario-Cordoba highway is a very good stop; it has a rest area with good shade, tables, and grills.

reviews.comment:
Hermosa estacion del ACA. Impecable por dentro y por fuera. Muy lindo parque para disfrutar de sus mesas y la sombra.

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful ACA station. Impeccable inside and out. Very nice park to enjoy its tables and shade.

reviews.comment:
Tiene un lindo lugar para sentarse a comer e incluso parrillas donde uno puede hacer un asado.por lo general no hay mucha gente por lo que es rápido cargar nafta. Tiene GNC también así que es muy completa. Todos son muy amables y atentos. Lo único no es ypf full pero venden comida todo como si fuera

(Translated by Google)
It has a nice place to sit and eat, and even grills where you can have a barbecue. It's usually not very crowded, so filling up is quick. It also has CNG, so it's very well-equipped. Everyone is very friendly and helpful. The only downside is that it's not a full YPF station, but they sell food and everything as if it were.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXcHBHZm53RRAB
